title: theme — HTTP middleware
description: One owned middleware for SSR token injection; the rest of the surface consumes foundation + tenancy stack.

middleware.name: theme.resolve_tokens_for_ssr
middleware.purpose: For any SSR request (Blade template, Inertia page, Vite SSR entry), resolve the caller's active theme + mode + accessibility_overrides and inject the compiled CSS URL (and inline token map for above-the-fold rendering) into the response's Content Security Policy + response headers. Downstream frontend code reads the pre-resolved theme without a round-trip.
middleware.notes: The middleware DOES NOT touch the response body — it only sets headers + a small script tag with inline resolved tokens if the caller is in the initial-render window. Frontend hydration picks up the tokens on mount.

consumed.notes: Required on every /api/v1/themes* route except /me/theme-preference which uses the caller's own token.
